rationale.R1.1: The agent identified the load-bearing concept, showed where the draft drifted, and proposed a stronger reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: The agent named one prior work and articulated the delta but did not map against multiple works.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for some claims but did not mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly stayed within scope with minor drifts, covering exactly the agreed set.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions and identified harmful patterns in the original draft.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits were not.
